'''âg-b-d-d''' ('''kagabdedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quicken|quicken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quicken|quicken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-b-d-d
|-
! Lemma
| kagabdedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigabdedoko|thigabdedoko]] || [[word:jigabdedoko|jigabdedoko]] || [[word:shigabdedoko|shigabdedoko]] || [[word:kigabdedoko|kigabdedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugabdedoko|thuthugabdedoko]] || [[word:jujugabdedoko|jujugabdedoko]] || [[word:shushugabdedoko|shushugabdedoko]] || [[word:kukugabdedoko|kukugabdedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugabdedoko|thugabdedoko]] || [[word:jugabdedoko|jugabdedoko]] || [[word:shugabdedoko|shugabdedoko]] || [[word:kugabdedoko|kugabdedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugabdedoko|thugabdedoko]] || [[word:jugabdedoko|jugabdedoko]] || [[word:shugabdedoko|shugabdedoko]] || [[word:kugabdedoko|kugabdedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegabdedoko|thegabdedoko]] || [[word:jegabdedoko|jegabdedoko]] || [[word:shegabdedoko|shegabdedoko]] || [[word:kegabdedoko|kegabdedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogabdedoko|thothogabdedoko]] || [[word:jojogabdedoko|jojogabdedoko]] || [[word:shoshogabdedoko|shoshogabdedoko]] || [[word:kokogabdedoko|kokogabdedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogabdedoko|thogabdedoko]] || [[word:jogabdedoko|jogabdedoko]] || [[word:shogabdedoko|shogabdedoko]] || [[word:kogabdedoko|kogabdedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogabdedoko|thogabdedoko]] || [[word:jogabdedoko|jogabdedoko]] || [[word:shogabdedoko|shogabdedoko]] || [[word:kogabdedoko|kogabdedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgabdedoko|thĂŠgabdedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠgabdedoko|jĂŠgabdedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠgabdedoko|shĂŠgabdedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠgabdedoko|kĂŠgabdedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagabdedoko|thagabdedoko]] || [[word:jagabdedoko|jagabdedoko]] || [[word:shagabdedoko|shagabdedoko]] || [[word:kagabdedoko|kagabdedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagabdedoko|thagabdedoko]] || [[word:jagabdedoko|jagabdedoko]] || [[word:shagabdedoko|shagabdedoko]] || [[word:kagabdedoko|kagabdedoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
